reviews.review_description: Hi my name is oliver i want to ask for mod Yes i reported every single person that mod in pub infection and i mod in modded lobby pls mod 🙏😔 my name in game is spiderman
This game has a mod menu and it looks exactly like gorilla tag

Could i get moderator some inte called me dog Walter they are so toxic so pls that Will be great for me 
👍🏻
May I have the right to be a administrator/moderator, I will make sure everything in the game is right and nothing goes wrong. In this statement I hope you would pick me.

It’s a great game and I know you will say no to this because I’ve asked most games for it and no response or no but I’ll try CAN I PLS BE MOD if not can I at least be a cosmetic mod something like that because I won’t just go in a lobby and say HEY EVERYONE I HAVE ALL THE COSMETICS I just want to try new cosmetic combos and learn more about them right know I at least have never heard of 20 cosmetics but besides all the mod application crap for people who look at the comments this is a great game personally I love it it’s great but owner pls I would die to at least be a cosmetic mod it’s sounds like I’m begging and trying not to
No mods anymore dude come on
I love this game it give you free mods very good game get it now
I absolutely HATE this game its a rip off gorilla tag there isn't any mods and it's got a toxic community wouldn't recommend for others

I later found out that they took away The Mods because they were abused. So I was one knowing if I could Can I have mods?. I didn't want to abuse them. I just wanted to Have fun? So please give me mods
I lovvvvvve this game but can you add summer splash update and under the sun Flash back plssss

Can I please get every Cosmetic in the game please and I need Stick￼ because and long arms please please please please please 
￼
Keep making the mod menus better and better each update
Where are the mods
I met bopcat and he friended me on oculus I love this game

Hello dear developers I wanted to apply me for being a mod ! 
Why ?
Here's why

1:Of course I will be friendly and nice to other ppl ( no toxicity).

2.I would be grateful that I would have mod, like every other person. (Understandable)

3. I won't abuse my mod menu or smth else I even would be Happy abt the stick😅.

I'm sorry if this message/Aplly isn't understandable ...

Btw ; BEST GAME ON THE APPLAB!!! 🥳

where can i find the link for the discord server because i would love to join it but when i asked a mod (a few secs ago) if they had a discord and they said yes they said it was unreal tag but its not anywhere so please add a link somewhere :) also great game fr fr

Don’t get this game it’s a fake unreal tag and it has bad quality it doesn’t even have mods only the owner has mods witch makes it bad and the moderators got the owner to ban me when the moderator was being toxic and swore at me With the words “shut the fu## up and he ended up calling me a mother fu##*r and he’s named Jolyne no not the gorilla tag moderator he’s a fake Jolyne with the stick and he’s so mean just don’t get this game they said they didint add mods I got lied to saying the game has mods in mountains but there is no mountains it’s that bad there isn’t even that much cosmetics just don’t get this game and try it moderators are in it at all times and ban u for no reason Just saying btw owners/mods Don’t be sad about the haters this is just not very nice work Also U banned me twice Some person called reset LITERALLY banned me for no absolute reason LITERALLY someone said I reported the whole lobby And I instantly got banned when he doesn’t even have any proof ur game is HORIBBLE not just the game doesnt have mods and the moderators suck BUT U THREATEND A NEW PLAYER TO CHANGE HIS NAMED OR U WILL BAN HIM
So bad honesly

Can you please give me the mod stick in the admin badge? I really need it. People are so much being toxic and I just really want to like be your partner I need to him I really do mean oh he really need to give me Moderator 
dude, are you seriously need it
I will be nice not ban or kick people and I can help in future updates and I will help the community out

This is a great game! It has old cosmetics, modded computer, mods, it even has servers! The bad things about it is that when you leave a public lobby you have to restart your game or you have to play alone. The game has a great community but I hate it when you go into a infection public everyone is modding. Besides those 2 things, this is a great game!
